category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a command-line interface to Force.com.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official ForceCLI/force repository; source_facts.name is forcecli.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage; source_facts.repo README is an official fallback documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Force.com CLI usage; source_facts.executables lists the force command.
